name: Loop End
description: End a loop and collect results into an array.
doc:
Mark the end of a loop body and collect results.

Usage:
• Connect the value from each iteration to the Result input
• All results are collected into an output array
• The Results output contains all iteration values in order

Pair with Loop Start:
Loop Start → (your processing nodes) → Loop End

Output:
Array of all values passed to the Result input across all iterations.

inputs.name: Result
inputs.description: Value to add to results array
